name: Kozik's Inferno
overview: "Kozik's Inferno" retells the tale of Dante's "Inferno" from the perspective of legendary underground artist Frank Kozik. In each twisted Webisode, Dante the Pig is led by Death through the nine levels of hell, meeting oddball characters as diverse as Richard Nixon and Monica Lewinsky. Three words leap to mind to describe Kozik’s world: wild, weird and totally whacked.
